_comment: Seed (pre-learning) reference data for the S8 learning-agent demo. This is deliberately INCOMPLETE: it is missing fund 8180 (General Post Fund) and USSGL 490200 (Delivered Orders - Obligations, Paid), both of which appear in the learning fixture. The demo starts from this seed every run so the demonstration is idempotent. The learned-reference-data.json the demo writes is this seed plus the SME-confirmed corrections.
